text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out and about town...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... They look so soft and fluffy! Maybe today's the day I... No, it's not like me to do something like this...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I need to get home fast. If someone sees me
here—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah! Y-you're one of the academy's trainers!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Aw, man... You saw everything, didn't you? I
guess anyone would stick out like a sore thumb
making a fuss in front of a cat cafe!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
To tell the truth, I just stumbled across this place
and was thinking of going inside for a bit...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But I suppose I should give it up for today.
Ahaha...
choice_data_list: Tell her it's important to unwind.
Teach her how to take advantage of a cafe visit.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Urk! It's fine! Just looking at the cats is enough to
soothe my sou—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nope. Never mind. I didn't mean to take another
look, but I did, and the last nail just entered my
coffin.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, how can I say no after seeing those big,
sparkling eyes staring at me through the window?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's like the kitty's calling for me... And it would
be rude to ignore such a sincere invitation! Well,
here I go, then!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... They were sooo cute... So fluffy-wuffy and
soft...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That does it! I'm going all out in training
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature leaves the cat cafe feeling so
refreshed and healed that she's practically
glowing with radiance.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh? They're doing a promotion for first-time
visitors?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, you're right! It's written on that board too.
And I can even get cat treats for free if I use the
smartphone coupon.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hm... My reputation as a coupon collector would
be ruined if I let this incredible deal slip through
my fingers!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Right! I have no choice but to go into the cafe!
Oh dear, woe is me! ♪
